word.definition: Xeric means "characterized by, relating to, or requiring only a small amount of moisture."

sports_fact.text: Steffi Graf's 1988 'Golden Slam' — all four majors plus Olympic gold in one year — has never been matched by any player.

market.headline: There’s an IPO Gold Rush—and Texas Is Coming for New York
market.summary: The state prides itself on its outsize ideas. It is hustling for business and this week bet big with the Texas Stock Exchange.

quote.text: Surely it is plain to the simplest intelligence that To Kill a Mockingbird spells out in words of seldom more than two syllables a code of honor and conduct, Christian in its ethic, that is the heritage of all Southerners. To hear that the novel is "immoral" has made me count the years between now and 1984, for I have yet to come across a better example of doublethink.
quote.author: Harper Lee

history.text: The nationalization of all large copper mines in Chile is completed.
